title: Better Dragon Eggs (Ice and Fire)
description: Makes Ice and Fires Dragon Eggs even better!
body:
![A Fire Dragon Egg.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc6509ed4e52a51176bc421879761f0630ee374d.png)
 
 Welcome, to Better Dragon Eggs. This mod expands the already existing Dragon Eggs in the Ice and Fire Minecraft Mod. Ice and Fire is a mod created by both Raptorfarian and Alexthe666, which hopes to add dragons in a proper way. 






Currently, Stage 4 and 5 Dragons can lay Wild Dragon Eggs. These Wild Eggs are hatched the same as in the normal mod, but they hatch Wild Stage 1 Dragons. If these eggs are not exposed to fire (Fire eggs) or water (Ice eggs) they will hatch at exactly 30 minutes of existing.

Note: This mod will be ported to newer versions in the future.

The Better Dragon Eggs (Ice and Fire) Team
